hero_desc: Instantly improve your resume and stand out to recruiters with AI-powered optimization. Build, analyze, and download — all in your browser.
features_desc: Everything you need to create a resume that lands interviews and your dream job.
feature_smart_desc: AI analyzes your resume structure, keywords, and content to maximize impact with recruiters and ATS systems.
feature_keyword_desc: Automatically identifies and suggests industry-specific keywords to ensure your resume passes ATS screening.
feature_analysis_desc: Get instant feedback on your resume's strengths and areas for improvement with detailed scoring.
feature_feedback_desc: See changes reflected instantly in your live preview as you type, with AI-powered suggestions.
highlight_impression_desc: Make your resume stand out in the first 6 seconds recruiters spend reviewing it.
highlight_skill_desc: Organize your skills and experience in a way that's easy to scan and understand.
highlight_visibility_desc: Optimized formatting ensures your resume gets seen by both humans and ATS.
templates_desc: Every template is optimized for ATS systems and designed by professionals.
faq_desc: Find answers to the most common questions about our resume builder.
faq_q1: How does the AI resume builder work?
faq_a1: Our AI analyzes your input, suggests improvements, optimizes keywords, and formats your resume for maximum impact with both ATS systems and human recruiters.
faq_q2: How do I create my profile on the platform?
faq_a2: Simply click 'Start for Free' and begin filling in your information. No account required to get started — your data stays in your browser.
faq_q3: Is my data secure and private?
faq_a3: Yes. All data processing happens locally in your browser. We don't store or send your personal information to any external servers.
faq_q4: Can AI actually improve my resume?
faq_a4: Absolutely. Our AI is trained on thousands of successful resumes and hiring patterns to provide actionable suggestions that increase your chances of landing interviews.
cta_title: Ready To Find Your Perfect Job?
cta_desc: Start your journey with AI-powered resume optimization today.
form_summary_placeholder: Write a brief summary highlighting your key qualifications, experience, and career goals...
form_description_placeholder: Describe your responsibilities and achievements (one per line)...
form_skills_label: Add your skills one by one (press Enter)
import_desc: Upload your CV and we'll automatically extract your information using AI.
import_warning: Importing a CV will replace your current data. Make sure to save any work first.
import_review: Review the extracted information before importing.
import_edit_after: You can edit all fields after import.
import_toast_desc: Your data has been filled in. Review and edit as needed.
dashboard_subtitle: Here's what's happening with your resumes.
resumes_desc: Manage and edit all your resumes in one place.
resumes_create_desc: Start from scratch or import your CV
settings_job_alerts_desc: Get notified about new job matches
